product: Object metadata column is now in Public Preview ​
tagline: July 8, 2026 The object metadata column is now in Public Preview.
what_it_does: July 8, 2026 The object metadata column is now in Public Preview. The object metadata column is a hidden metadata column that exposes object level properties for objects in cloud storage, including MIME type, ETag, user defined key value metadata, system defined metadata, and object tags.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
